title: Figure 18 from: Rathnayaka AR, Chethana KWT, Manowong A, Bhagya AT, Win H, Tun ZL, Mapook A, Hyde KD (2025) Taxonomy, phylogeny, and bioactive potential of Xylariales (Sordariomycetes, Ascomycota) from Thailand: novel species discovery, new host and geographical records, and antibacterial properties. MycoKeys 120: 35-117. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.120.155915
author: Rathnayaka, Achala R.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 18 Diatrypella thailandica on a dead branch of Fabaceae sp. (MFLU 24-0533, holotype) a. Substrate; b, c. Stromata on the substrate; d. Cross-section of a stroma; e. Vertical section through stroma showing ostiole and perithecia; f. Ostiole; g. Peridium; h. Paraphyses; i–l. Asci; m. Apical apparatus in Melzer's reagent; n–q. Ascospores. Scale bars: 2 mm (b); 500 μm (c); 200 μm (d); 100 μm (e, f); 10 μm (g); 20 μm (h–m); 5 μm (n–q).
